klmWeylInputStatus.label: all-omega KLM/Weyl positivity input
klmWeylInputStatus.reason: The uniform omega bridge proves original Weyl positivity and the hbar=1 KLM positive-type condition for Q_omega for every |omega|<1/2.

bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.label: exact RH/de Branges bridge statement isolated
bridgeStatementIsolatedStatus.reason: The missing theorem is now isolated: construct an explicit transform from the all-omega KLM/Weyl positive family to an RH-equivalent de Branges/Hermite-Biehler or Laguerre-Polya positivity criterion, then prove the endpoint/closure passage.

klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.label: KLM-to-de Branges transform
klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.reason: klm_debranges_intertwiner_attempt.py writes the natural shifted-Xi candidate explicitly, but also shows that this candidate is circular unless one constructs an operator, reproducing-kernel pullback, or closed-cone limiting map from the KLM positive kernels to the de Branges kernel.
klmToDeBrangesTransformStatus.blocker: Prove positivity/annihilation of the augmented trace repair (Lambda_a, Mu_z): combine the diagonal Volterra tail identity with the new Mellin-boundary concomitant without introducing a negative Schur defect.

criticalEndpointClosureStatus.label: critical endpoint and positive-cone closure
criticalEndpointClosureStatus.reason: The abstract positive-cone closure theorem is proved in klm_debranges_intertwiner_attempt.py: entrywise convergence of finite Gram matrices preserves positivity, and dense-core form convergence extends by closure.  It becomes applicable once the missing intertwiner identifies the endpoint de Branges kernel.

rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.label: Riemann hypothesis / de Branges conclusion
rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.reason: Conditional only.  The endpoint positive-cone closure theorem is now available, but the non-circular KLM-to-de Branges transform is still missing.  Once that transform is proved, the established all-omega KLM positivity can be transported to the intended RH-equivalent positivity statement.
rhDeBrangesConclusionStatus.blocker: Prove positivity/annihilation of the augmented trace repair (Lambda_a, Mu_z): combine the diagonal Volterra tail identity with the new Mellin-boundary concomitant without introducing a negative Schur defect.

conditionalTheorem: If there exists an explicit transform T from the all-omega KLM/Weyl positive family Q_omega to an RH-equivalent de Branges/Hermite-Biehler or Laguerre-Polya positivity criterion, then the established KLM positivity and the now-proved abstract positive-cone endpoint closure prove the intended RH-side positivity statement.
nextProofTarget: Prove positivity/annihilation of the augmented trace repair (Lambda_a, Mu_z): combine the diagonal Volterra tail identity with the new Mellin-boundary concomitant without introducing a negative Schur defect.
